title: Nuremberg, Bavaria — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Nuremberg, Bavaria: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Nuremberg is a city in Bavaria with a population of 518,000. A medieval gem in Bavaria, famous for its imperial castle, Christmas market, gingerbread, and rich history as a toy-making capital.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
